foundation_complete: Contract/read-model design exists and is tested.
No requirement for executable client entrypoint yet.
Must not be reported as runnable client delivery.
runtime_mvp: Executable client entrypoint exists and starts successfully.
Core user flows run against backend API with explicit degraded-state behavior.
Smoke test evidence exists for startup and one end-to-end happy path.
runtime_complete: Runtime MVP checks pass consistently in CI.
Security, approval, audit and redaction behaviors are tested.
Packaging, versioning and rollback guidance are available.

runtime_mvp: Dedicated TUI package and start command exist.
runtime_complete: CI lane runs TUI tests and smoke flow.
Release artifact and install docs are validated.

runtime_mvp: Plugin project markers exist (plugin.xml, META-INF/MANIFEST.MF or equivalent build metadata).
At least one context handoff and one task/artifact view flow works.
runtime_complete: Build + smoke checks are enforced in CI.
Install/run instructions validated on clean Eclipse setup.

runtime_mvp: Lua runtime plugin modules exist and load in Neovim.
Bounded context and explicit result rendering are functional.
Headless Neovim smoke check exists and exercises at least one mocked command path.
runtime_complete: Headless Neovim tests and smoke checks pass in CI.
Versioned plugin packaging and help docs are shipped.

runtime_mvp: Compatibility subset is explicit and tested.
Unsupported features degrade with explicit guidance.
runtime_complete: Compatibility matrix checks run in CI.
Editor-specific install and troubleshooting docs are verified.
